products.name: MB-2590-300 High Capacity Rechargeable Li-ion Battery with SMBus
products.descriptor: 300 Wh military BB-2590 form-factor rechargeable Li-ion battery with SMBus

evidence.snippet: [MB-2590-300 High Capacity Rechargeable Li-ion Battery with SMBus](https://inventuspower.com/product/300wh-rechargeable-li-ion-battery-with-smbus/)

As an extension to our offering of military-standard batteries, Inventus Power also offers a BB-2590 rechargeable battery which is well-known in the military market for powering applications such as radios, advanced tactical devices, and robotics.  At 298Whr,  the Inventus Power BB-2590 is one of the highest capacity versions on the market.

products.name: CWB 3.6.2 InvincStable® 200 Wh Conformal Wearable Battery
products.descriptor: 200 Wh soldier-worn conformal wearable Li-ion battery for US Army warfighter

evidence.snippet: [CWB 3.6.2 InvincStable® 200 Wh Conformal Wearable Battery](https://inventuspower.com/product/cwb-3-6-2-invincstable-200-wh-conformal-wearable-battery/)

John: Inventus Power has been delivering battery systems for the US Army for over 20 years. We are most notable for our contributions to warfighter wearable power technology being the original producer of the [Conformal Wearable Battery (CWB)](https://inventuspower.com/conformal-wearable-batteries/); a safe, flexible, and highly-efficient centralized power source for all warfighter-worn battery-operated equipment or carried equipment ensemble.

SBM-01 Smart Battery Monitor
============================
Optional add-on device to complement our line of PROformance Batteries
